zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I於1250年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林時，他的父親Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III38歲，母親Margarethe von Mecklenburg40歲。他於1270年與Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1323年2月3日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I于1250年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林时，他的父亲Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III38岁，母亲Margarethe von Mecklenburg40岁。他于1270年与Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel在德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1323年2月3日在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schwerin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the places called Schwerin, in Mecklenburg, Brandenburg, and Pomerania.

nameMeanings.name: Hagen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1 Germanic: short form of various compound names formed with hag ‘stockade, enclosure’.

variants.name: Håkon
meanings: from the Old Norse personal name Hákon, from hā ‘horse’ or ‘high’ + konr ‘son, descendant’; borne by Haakon VII of Norway ( 1872–1957 ), and by Crown Prince Haakon Magnus ( b. 1973 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I was born in 1250, in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III, was 38 and his mother, Margarethe von Mecklenburg, was 40. He married Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel in 1270, in Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 3 February 1323, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I est né en 1250, à Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margarethe von Mecklenburg, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel en 1270, à Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 3 février 1323, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Mecklenburg, Nordwestmecklenburg, Meckle: Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I 1250 in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III 38 und seine Mutter Margarethe von Mecklenburg 40. Er hat 1270 in Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Februar 1323 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I è nato il nel 1250 nel Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margarethe von Mecklenburg, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel nel 1270, nel Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 febbraio 1323, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin Iが1250年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンスチウエリンで生まれた時，父Graf Gunzel von Schwerin IIIは38歳，母Margarethe von Mecklenburgは40歳であった。1270年にドイツプレウssンスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス スチレスウィグでElisabeth von Holstein-Kielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1323年2月3日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.Mecklenburg, Nordwestmecklenburg, Meckle: 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 크레이스 노르드w스트클렌버그 도르프 클렌버그 클렌버그
ko.lifeSummary: Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I(이)가 1250년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margarethe von Mecklenburg(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1270년 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그에서 Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 2월 3일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I nasceu em 1250, em Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe von Mecklenburg, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel em 1270, em Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1323, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I родился в 1250 г. в местности щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarethe von Mecklenburg, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel в 1270 г. в местности крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 3 февраля 1323 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Niklot Hagen von Schwerin I nació en 1250, en Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Graf Gunzel von Schwerin III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margarethe von Mecklenburg, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Holstein-Kiel en 1270, en Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1323, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
